div.p: States and transitions for pool growth decisions

CAN_GROW: chunk_count < max_chunks AND total_bytes < max_bytes AT_CHUNK_LIMIT: chunk_count >= max_chunks (max_chunks > 0) AT_BYTE_LIMIT: total_bytes + chunk_size > max_bytes (max_bytes > 0) GROW_FAILED: malloc() or aligned_alloc() returned NULL POOL_EXHAUSTED: free_list_head == NULL AND cannot grow
